items.caption: A clean and modern design for a voice assistant control interface. dominating the center is a large blue circle, within which a white microphone is prominently displayed. the microphone, symbolizing the voice assistant's ability to listen and communicate, is surrounded by a subtle gray wave pattern, suggesting the audio waves it captures. above the microphone, the words "voice assistant" are written in bold black letters, clearly indicating the purpose of the interface. below the microphone, a "read more" button is visible, inviting users to explore further. the entire design is set against a white background, which is framed by a blue border, creating a harmonious color scheme. the overall layout is simple yet effective, conveying the functionality of the voice assistant control in a visually appealing manner.
